ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "customer_lifetime_value" REAL /* Customer lifetime value */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the company */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the customer (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "income_bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_income_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_bin_id") REFERENCES income_bins ("income_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the policy */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy type */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coverage level */,
  "effective_to_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "renew_offer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renewal offer type */,
  "monthly_premium_auto" REAL /* Monthly premium for the policy */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., Active, Expired, Cancelled) */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "total_premium" REAL /* Total premium for the policy period */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles covered under the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverages ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_renew_offer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("renew_offer_type_id") REFERENCES renew_offer_types ("renew_offer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that covers the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., Four-Door Car, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_size" TEXT /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., Medsize, Large) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., A, Unknown) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that the claim is associated with */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the claim */,
  "months_since_last_claim" INTEGER /* Number of months since the last claim */,
  "months_since_policy_inception" INTEGER /* Number of months since the policy inception */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Open, Closed, In Review) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adjuster handling the claim */,
  "settlement_amount" REAL /* Final settlement amount */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the settlement was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES adjusters ("adjuster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Agent, Call Center, Branch) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the sales channel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication with the sales channel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for direct contact with the sales channel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sales channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sales channel (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type (e.g., Corporate Auto, Personal Auto) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverages" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage level */,
  "coverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the coverage level (e.g., Basic, Extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renew_offer_types" (
  "renew_offer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal offer type */,
  "renew_offer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the renewal offer type (e.g., Offer1, Offer2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renew_offer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that the response is associated with */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the offer (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_bins" (
  "income_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bin */,
  "income_bin_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bin (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusters" (
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjuster */,
  "adjuster_name" TEXT /* Name of the adjuster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication with the adjuster */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for direct contact with the adjuster */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the adjuster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the adjuster (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjuster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication with the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for direct contact with the agent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel the agent is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id")
)
